Hey {$name|there},
Welcome to The Vibe Check Project. You just made a good call.
Here's your first affirmation — no strings, no fluff:

"You are allowed to take up space. Your needs matter. Your feelings are valid."
Save that. Screenshot it. Send it to someone who needs it.

(Tap to download full size)

"You're doing better than you think"

"Rest is not weakness"

"Your presence makes a difference"
Every Sunday I send a free card pack — 5 affirmation cards you can send to people you care about.

Talk soon,
Devin @ The Vibe Check Project
